overview.description: Energy and utilities in Vietnam face rapid transition challenges: solar/wind expansion, grid modernization, and rising demand. AI applications include demand forecasting, predictive maintenance, and smart grid optimization.
overview.marketSizeVietnam: ~$15B electricity market; EVN manages national grid; 50% renewable target by 2030

domainKnowledge.typicalDataVolume: Very high — millions of smart meters; real-time grid data streams
domainKnowledge.dataQuality: Medium — legacy systems mixed with modern SCADA; rural meters still analog

painPoints.problem: Grid instability from intermittent renewables requires better demand/supply forecasting
Infrastructure failures (transformers, cables) cause costly outages
Energy theft and meter tampering cause revenue loss
Renewable energy yield prediction is imprecise, causing grid imbalance

relatedNodes.description: Manufacturing is the largest industrial energy consumer.
EV adoption links energy and transportation sectors.
